headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Arista Networks, Raises Price Target to $200
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Tal Liani   maintains Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) with a Buy and raises the price target from $185 to $200.

headline: Arista Networks: Thank The Meltdown For Dip Buying Opportunity - Multi-Year AI Winner
summary: Arista Networks looks like an AI networking winner due to its raised FY2026 guidance, expanding TAM, and cheaper valuation. Click for this ANET stock update.
